S.FORM: = Horacio Cartes = Mntucing hngkawas 1956 idas 7 jiyax 5 ka Horacio Cartes ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Paraguay ta sayang o kiya ka Horacio Cartes, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 8 jiyax 15 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ħoɾaʦio ʦaɾtəs = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka ħoɾaʦio ʦaɾtəs ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan paɾaguaj ta sajaŋ o kija ka ħoɾaʦio ʦaɾtəs, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
S.FORM: = Horacio Cartes = Mntucing hngkawas 1956 idas 7 jiyax 5 ka Horacio Cartes ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Paraguay ta sayang o kiya ka Horacio Cartes, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 8 jiyax 15 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ħoɾaʦio ʦaɾtəs = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka ħoɾaʦio ʦaɾtəs ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan paɾaguaj ta sajaŋ o kija ka ħoɾaʦio ʦaɾtəs, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
